diagrams.title: Internet Checksum Calculation Flow
diagrams.description: Shows the step-by-step process of computing checksum at sender and verifying at receiver
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the complete checksum calculation and verification process

diagrams.title: IP Header Checksum Coverage
diagrams.description: Highlights which fields are included and excluded in IP header checksum calculation
diagrams.purpose: Identifying fields included in IP checksum vs fields that change during routing

diagrams.title: One's Complement vs Two's Complement
diagrams.description: Comparison of 8-bit representations showing the difference between one's and two's complement
elements: Note: Two representations of zero in one's complement
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the arithmetic used in checksum calculation

diagrams.title: Error Detection Coverage
diagrams.description: Visual comparison of error detection capabilities of parity, checksum, and CRC
diagrams.purpose: Choosing appropriate error detection method based on requirements
